conservative.name: Destroy Magic
conservative.requirements:
6 Power
Target within close range. The target must be under the effects of a spell with the Ongoing trait, a brief condition granted by a spell or a similar effect

success.description: 1 magic effect affecting the target is cancelled
2 magic effects affecting the target are cancelled
All magic effects affecting the target are cancelled

boon.description: The caster of any magic effects cancelled by this spell suffers 1 stress and adds 2 recharge tokens to those spells

reckless.name: Destroy Magic
reckless.requirements:
6 Power
Target within medium range. The target must be under the effects of a spell with the Ongoing trait, a brief condition granted by a spell, or a similar effect

success.description: 1 magic effect affecting the target is cancelled
As above, and the caster of that effect suffers 1 stress and adds 2 recharge tokens to the spell that generated the effect

boon.description: The caster of any magic effects cancelled by this spell suffers 1 stress and adds 2 recharge tokens to those spells
